message:
fix(cli): resolve type mismatches and add missing modules

- Fix commands/mod.rs to properly import Commands from cli module
- Add validate command module stub
- Add tx.rs storage transaction module stub
- Update cass client with enhanced functionality
- Fix ACIP regex escaping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,6 +87,8 @@ once_cell = "1.19"
 itertools = "0.13"
 textwrap = "0.16"
 semver = "1.0"
+fs2 = "0.4"
+hostname = "0.4"
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
